hero.description: Deploy serverless functions, manage edge databases, and orchestrate AI pipelines.

globalNetwork.title: Deploy globally, instantly.
globalNetwork.description: Your code runs within milliseconds of your users. Our intelligent edge network automatically routes traffic to the nearest healthy node.

lightningFast.title: Lightning Fast
lightningFast.description: Deploy to 150+ edge locations worldwide in under a second. Your code runs closer to your users than ever before.

secureByDefault.title: Secure by Default
secureByDefault.description: Enterprise-grade security with automatic HTTPS, DDoS protection, and edge authentication.

realtimeAnalytics.title: Real-time Analytics
realtimeAnalytics.description: Monitor performance, errors, and usage in real-time with detailed insights.

aiGateway.title: AI Gateway
aiGateway.description: Unified API for all major AI providers. Route requests intelligently, manage costs, and monitor usage across all your AI workloads.

developerExperience.description: Forget about Kubernetes, Dockerfiles, or load balancers. Just write a function and we deploy it to 150+ edge locations instantly. Focus on your logic, not the infrastructure.

cta.title: Ready to ship your next big thing?
cta.description: Join 100,000+ developers building the future on Nexus.

cta.disclaimer: No credit card required for free tier.
